bitbucketUrl.title: Bitbucket Cloud API URL
bitbucketUrl.description: Bitbucket Cloud REST API v2 base URL (e.g. https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0)

useSystemProxy.title: Use system proxy
useSystemProxy.description: Use the system proxy configured by your administrator

username.title: Workspace
username.description: ID of the workspace (or username) that owns the repository. Used to build the repository URL, NOT for authentication.

branchOrTag.title: Ref
branchOrTag.description: Branch name or tag (e.g. master). Defaults to master.

filepath.title: Filepath
filepath.description: The path to the file to fetch (e.g. /docs/main/README.md)

login.title: Atlassian account email
login.description: Email address of the Atlassian account used for Basic authentication with an API token. See https://support.atlassian.com/bitbucket-cloud/docs/using-api-tokens/

password.title: API token
password.description: Atlassian API token with the 'read:repository:bitbucket' scope, created at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. Bitbucket Cloud app passwords and account passwords are no longer accepted.

autoFetch.title: Enable Auto Fetch
autoFetch.description: Enable a periodic update of this documentation page

fetchCron.title: Update frequency
fetchCron.description: Define update frequency using Crontab pattern. Leaving it empty will not trigger any update. Note: Platform administrator may have configured a max frequency that you cannot exceed.
